assertion_results.text: Step 7 detects concurrent triage TC-8019 on the same upstream component (quinn-proto) with status In Progress
assertion_results.evidence: concurrent-triage.md heading is 'Concurrent Triage Detection -- Step 7', field on TC-8020 is 'quinn-proto' (line 5), and results table shows TC-8019 with status 'In Progress' (lines 19-22).

assertion_results.text: The concurrent triage warning includes the conflicting CVE issue key (TC-8019) and its assignee
assertion_results.evidence: concurrent-triage.md warning block (lines 28-43) includes a table with TC-8019 and assignee 'engineer-b@example.com'.

assertion_results.text: The output presents three options: wait for the other triage to complete, skip remediation task creation, or proceed with a concurrent-triage-overlap label
assertion_results.evidence: concurrent-triage.md lines 39-43: Option 1 'Wait -- pause until TC-8019's triage completes', Option 2 'Skip -- skip remediation task creation for this CVE entirely', Option 3 'Proceed -- create tasks anyway with a concurrent-triage-overlap label'.

assertion_results.text: The concurrent triage check runs before Case A/B/C branching in Step 8
